headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -27.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending down 54% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 111 quotes and 70 at strong intensity, driving people to vent intensely despite dropping from yesterday's peak.
• Frustration levels remain well above the historical range, while both fears and optimism sit in negative territory below typical activity.
• Optimism showed slight recovery from yesterday but remains heavily suppressed with only modest engagement.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
